{{Quote|Solan is well known on his planet, widely feared and respected. He gets what he needs through threats, violence, and influence.|[[Jocasta Nu/Legends|Jocasta Nu]]|<ref name="Jedi Apprentice: The Only Witness">''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Only Witness]]''</ref>}}
'''Solan Cobral''' was the son of [[Zanita Cobral]] and the figurehead behind the [[Cobral family]]'s crime syndicate. He was manipulated by his mother, though he never admitted it. He was involved in the [[Death/Legends|death]] of his younger brother, [[Rutin Cobral]].

{{Char-stub}}
